The ideal candidate has specific industry experience in similar industries, Strong interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to consult, partner, and work effectively with analyst leaders and business partners across cultures and functions, Process improvement skills to identify opportunities for advancement of data collection and management, Desire to advance in understanding data collection and organization, Associate's degree or equivalent required, Software: Required – strong working knowledge of MS Excel and internet research. core_responsibilities: Maintains and assists in the development of scaled collection and review processes to keep equipment databases in line with industry trends, Develops expertise and innovation for quality control processes supporting EquipmentWatch and Price Digests, Clearly communicates needs with analyst and management staff, Reports weekly progress to analysts and managers, Runs bi-monthly sprint processes and assists the other team members
job_summary: Fusable is a company that provides analytics and benchmarking sources for off-highway equipment and on-highway vehicles. The Data Specialist will support the maintenance of internal databases by collecting and organizing data, cleansing existing data, and running bi-monthly data sprints while collaborating with Data Analysts and Senior Data Specialists.
